commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed; this active PR is maintainer-editable, has sufficient proof, and I found no narrow defect for automation to fix.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff adds no dependencies, workflows, package-resolution changes, or new execution surface, and it bounds process metadata to exact scoped sessions with fail-closed no-scope behavior. (sha=ea748b0255364516cfa308b340ff3141e56fc7e1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds scoped active background exec/process session snapshots to embedded compaction, after-turn runtime contexts, and system prompts, with regression coverage and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main has scoped background process sessions but does not carry active process references through compaction/runtime prompts, matching the linked report at https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/79284.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; this active PR is maintainer-editable, has sufficient proof, and I found no narrow defect for automation to fix.
